notes: Use this for seed-stage startups with 3-6 people wearing multiple hats. The flat, minimal structure prevents over-engineering. Home acts as the daily driver. Avoid sub-nesting more than 2 levels deep until headcount exceeds 8.

notes: Ideal for product-focused teams post-Series A. The Command Center keeps all three disciplines aligned on a single daily entry point. ADR Log is critical for engineering teams making architectural decisions over time. Link Linear/Jira from sidebar rather than duplicating task management inside Notion.

в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ вңҸпёҸ In Progress
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ‘Җ In Review
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ вң… Published
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҘ Video Production Tracker
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“ұ Social Media Vault

рҹ“§ Demand Generation
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ё Email Campaign Library
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ§І Lead Magnet Tracker
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ§Ә Paid Ads Log

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ‘Ө Buyer Personas
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ“– Marketing Playbooks
notes: The Blog Post Pipeline using a Kanban-style nested structure works exceptionally well for editorial teams. The SEO Keyword Database should be a Notion database with properties: keyword, volume, difficulty, assigned writer, target URL. Use this structure when your team produces 4+ pieces of content per week.

title: Remote-First Team of 12 (Async-Optimized)
example:
рҹҢҚ Async HQ

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ӣ Decision Log (with date + owner + rationale)
в””в”Җв”Җ вқ“ Open Questions Board

рҹ“… Rhythm
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ—“пёҸ Weekly Async Standup Template
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”Ғ Retrospectives Archive
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ Quarterly Review Docs
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ§ӯ Monthly All-Hands Notes

рҹ”Ё Projects
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҹў Active Projects
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Project Alpha
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Project Beta
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Project Gamma
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вҸёпёҸ On Hold
в””в”Җв”Җ вң… Completed Archive

рҹ“ҡ Team Wiki
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҷӢ Team Directory (with timezone, focus hours, Slack handle)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹӨқ How We Communicate
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹӣ пёҸ Tools We Use
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Meeting-Free Guidelines

рҹ’¬ Water Cooler
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҸҶ Wins & Shoutouts
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“ҡ What We're Reading
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Random (fun stuff)
notes: The Decision Log is the backbone of async-first teams вҖ” document every significant decision with context so late joiners understand the 'why.' The Open Questions Board prevents decisions from stalling. Water Cooler section compensates for the absence of hallway chats. Pair this with a strict 'write it down' culture norm.

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ—ӮпёҸ Active Deal Rooms
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ӣ Deal Review Template
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ’Ў Objection Handling Library
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Discovery Call Framework

рҹҺ“ Enablement
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“– Sales Playbook
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҒ Pitch Deck Library (by ICP segment)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“§ Email Sequence Templates
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”¬ Competitor Battle Cards
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ’¬ Customer Success Stories

рҹ“Ҡ Reporting
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҳ Weekly Activity Reports
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”Қ Lost Deal Analysis
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ’ё Commission Calculations
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ“ү Forecast Log

вҡҷпёҸ Process

в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ“ң SLAs (Sales вҶ” Marketing, Sales вҶ” CS)
notes: The Objection Handling Library is the most-referenced page for junior reps вҖ” populate it with real objections from Gong call recordings. Deal Rooms should each be a sub-page with a standard template: deal overview, stakeholder map, next steps, blockers. Battle Cards should be one page per competitor with win/loss rate data.

рҹ‘Ҙ People Ops HQ

рҹҡҖ Onboarding
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… 30-60-90 Day Template

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҸў Company Handbook

рҹҺ“ Learning & Development

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ Performance Review Templates
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ’¬ 1:1 Agenda Templates

рҹҸҘ Benefits & Compensation
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ’° Compensation Bands (access-restricted)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҸҘ Benefits Guide
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҢҙ PTO Tracker
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ“ң Leave Policy

рҹ“ң Legal & Compliance
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ӣ Employment Contracts Archive
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”’ NDA Tracker
в””в”Җв”Җ вҡ–пёҸ Compliance Checklist
notes: Access control is critical here вҖ” use Notion's page permissions to restrict Compensation Bands and Employment Contracts to HR leads only. Career Ladders are high-impact for retention: build them as databases with levels, skills, and expected behaviors. Connect the HR Helpdesk Queue to a Slack bot for ticket intake.

в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ’Ў Icebox

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“җ System Design Docs

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”— API Documentation Index

notes: Rename 'Current Sprint' to the actual sprint number and dates вҖ” this naming convention prevents confusion. The ADR Log is non-negotiable for teams making long-term tech decisions. Post-Mortem Archive becomes a goldmine for retrospectives. If you use Linear or Jira, embed links rather than duplicating task management here.

example:

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”ҙ At Risk (NPS 0-5)
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ”„ Churned (Archive)

рҹ“Ӣ Account Templates
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ—әпёҸ Customer Success Plan Template
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ QBR (Quarterly Business Review) Template
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Onboarding Kickoff Template
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ“һ Check-In Call Agenda

рҹ“ҡ Enablement & Resources
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“– Product Knowledge Base
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”„ Escalation Playbook
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ’Ў Upsell / Expansion Playbook
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҸҶ Case Study Library
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹҺҒ Customer Gift & Swag Tracker

рҹ“Ҡ Metrics & Reporting
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҳ Monthly Churn Report
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ’° NRR / GRR Tracker
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ӣ CSAT / NPS Survey Results
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ”Қ Churn Post-Mortem Log

рҹӨқ Cross-Team

notes: The 4-tier customer health folder structure (Healthy/Neutral/At Risk/Churned) enables instant portfolio scanning. Each customer account page should have: CSM owner, contract value, renewal date, last contact date, health score. The Churn Post-Mortem Log вҖ” when filled in consistently вҖ” becomes your most valuable data set for product and sales.

рҹҺҜ Strategy

в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ”Қ Investor Update Drafts

в”ңв”Җв”Җ вҡ пёҸ Risk Register

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҳ Key Metrics Dashboard (linked)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ’ё Budget vs. Actuals
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ’° Runway & Burn Tracker

рҹ‘Ҙ People
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ—әпёҸ Org Chart

рҹҢҚ External

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“° Press & PR Archive
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ”Қ Market Intelligence Notes
notes: The 'Priority Stack (what we're NOT doing)' is a high-impact page вҖ” leadership alignment is as much about explicit non-priorities as priorities. The Risk Register should be reviewed monthly. Restrict the Executive Compensation page to individual view permissions. This structure works best when the leadership team commits to writing decisions down synchronously.

в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ§  Research Repository

в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Shipped Projects
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ—„пёҸ Archive

рҹ“Ӣ Process
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ—әпёҸ Design Process Overview
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Design Review Checklist
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹӨқ Designer вҶ” PM Collaboration Guide

notes: The Research Repository becomes the most valuable long-term asset вҖ” build it as a tagged database with fields: date, method, product area, key insight, linked design. The Accessibility Checklist should live in Process, not tucked in Systems, so it's referenced during active work. Quick Links to Figma prevents the 'where's the file?' Slack message.

notes: Keep the Data Room Index as a table of contents pointing to Google Drive/Dropbox, not the actual documents вҖ” Notion isn't the right repository for sensitive financial files. The Monthly Close Checklist should be a template duplicated each month with checkboxes and owners assigned. SaaS subscription tracking here can save thousands annually when reviewed quarterly.
